name: action-ack-sequence
description: A declared action dispatched on the live channel persists to the GguiSession's consume buffer before the ack: the server appends the envelope as an event, assigns a monotonic sequence, and the ack frame echoes the action's requestId carrying `payload.sequence`. Proves the persistence half of the single action-routing model — the agent drains the buffer via `ggui_consume` on its next turn (an MCP tool call outside this WS kit's observation window).
